CustomField.description: API name of the field on the child object to evaluate. Enter the field name only, without the object prefix. Correct: UJET__Fail_Reason__c. Incorrect: UJET__UJET_Session__c.UJET__Fail_Reason__c.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Field API name only. Do not use dot notation. (Example: UJET__Status__c).
CustomField.label: Child Filter Field
